'''âw-dh-l-l''' ('''kawadhleloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turntable|turntable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turntable|turntable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-dh-l-l
|-
! Lemma
| kawadhleloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadhleloko|thiwadhleloko]] || [[word:jiwadhleloko|jiwadhleloko]] || [[word:shiwadhleloko|shiwadhleloko]] || [[word:kiwadhleloko|kiwadhleloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwadhleloko|thuthuwadhleloko]] || [[word:jujuwadhleloko|jujuwadhleloko]] || [[word:shushuwadhleloko|shushuwadhleloko]] || [[word:kukuwadhleloko|kukuwadhleloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadhleloko|thowadhleloko]] || [[word:jowadhleloko|jowadhleloko]] || [[word:showadhleloko|showadhleloko]] || [[word:kowadhleloko|kowadhleloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwadhleloko|thĂŠwadhleloko]] || [[word:jĂŠwadhleloko|jĂŠwadhleloko]] || [[word:shĂŠwadhleloko|shĂŠwadhleloko]] || [[word:kĂŠwadhleloko|kĂŠwadhleloko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
